title: Joseph and the Coat of Many Colors

scenes.narration: Joseph had eleven brothers. And he was the favorite. Everyone knew it.
scenes.image_prompt: Young Joseph smiling next to his father Jacob, eleven older brothers standing behind looking unhappy, bright colorful bible storybook illustration, warm family scene

scenes.narration: One day their father gave Joseph a coat. Not just any coat. A coat of every color.
scenes.image_prompt: Father Jacob handing young Joseph a beautiful rainbow coat covered in bright colors and patterns, Joseph's eyes wide with wonder, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Joseph wore it everywhere. His brothers hated that coat. And they hated him.
scenes.image_prompt: Joseph walking proudly in his rainbow coat of many colors, brothers scowling in the background with jealous expressions, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Then Joseph had a dream. He told his brothers — one day you'll all bow down to me.
scenes.image_prompt: Joseph speaking excitedly to his brothers around a dinner table, brothers looking furious and shocked, colorful bible storybook illustration, tense but bright style

scenes.narration: That was the last straw. The brothers grabbed him and threw him into a deep pit.
scenes.image_prompt: Joseph being lowered into a deep stone pit by his angry brothers, Joseph looking worried but brave, colorful dramatic bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: They sold him to traders. Joseph disappeared. Everyone thought he was gone for good.
scenes.image_prompt: Joseph being led away by desert traders with camels across a sandy landscape, brothers watching from a distance, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: But God had a plan. Joseph worked hard. Years later he became the second most powerful man in Egypt.
scenes.image_prompt: Adult Joseph in fine Egyptian royal robes standing before Pharaoh's throne, powerful and wise expression, golden Egyptian palace, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: When a famine hit, his brothers came to Egypt for food. They didn't recognize him.
scenes.image_prompt: Joseph's eleven brothers kneeling and bowing before a grand Egyptian throne, Joseph sitting on the throne in royal clothes watching them, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Joseph forgave every one of them. What they meant for evil, God used for good.
scenes.image_prompt: Joseph embracing his brothers in a warm reunion, all crying happy tears together, golden warm light, colorful joyful bible storybook illustration
